description: The CodeBoarding project represents a pipeline that transforms raw source code into AI-enriched architectural documentation. The flow begins with environment bootstrapping and orchestration, moves through multi-language static analysis to build a call graph, partitions that graph for LLM context management, utilizes agentic reasoning for code abstraction, performs incremental health checks, and concludes by generating interactive diagrams and reports.
